message:
Running command: # The process reads antenna_check.tcl from the SAME librelane scripts path.
# Let's check the actual TCL env file for step 36 - particularly VERILOG_FILES
grep -c "VERILOG_FILES\|CURRENT_NETLIST" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/_env.tcl 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
# Check for something that could cause infinite computation
grep "set_global_connections\|global_connect\|ANTENNA" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/_env.tcl | head -5
